scripts.build:app: killall Blitz 2>/dev/null; BUILD_CONFIG=${BUILD_CONFIG:-release} CODESIGN_TIMESTAMP=${CODESIGN_TIMESTAMP:-auto} bash scripts/bundle.sh ${BUILD_CONFIG:-release} && open .build/Blitz.app
scripts.build:app:debug: killall Blitz 2>/dev/null; CODESIGN_TIMESTAMP=none bash scripts/bundle.sh debug && open .build/Blitz.app
scripts.build:app:release: killall Blitz 2>/dev/null; bash scripts/bundle.sh release && open .build/Blitz.app
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$VERSION" && git tag "v$VERSION" && git push origin master --tags
scripts.install:local: npm run build:pkg && sudo pkill -f blitz-postinstall 2>/dev/null; sudo installer -pkg build/Blitz-*.pkg -target / -verbose && open /Applications/Blitz.app
